name: openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG
description: Support routine CI tasks in the community, monitor community access control and build OBS packages.

name: openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG maintains 10 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Support routine CI tasks in the community, monitor community access control and build OBS packages.. The SIG has 7 core members and maintains 10 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at gatekeeper@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG maintains 10 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Gatekeeper.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Gatekeeper SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: George.Cao, solarhu, TommyLike. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
